ddls:
CREATE TABLE "expense_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is currently active */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category for hierarchical management */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expense category */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the expense */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Specific date of the expense */,
  "amount" REAL /* Expense amount for the fiscal year */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the expense */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department responsible for the expense */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project or initiative related to the expense */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the expense data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the expense data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_data_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES expense_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_data_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department responsible for the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Analyst, Viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_department_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user for the department (e.g., Read, Write, Admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "department_id")
)
